title: Stack Overview for ucsg-intranet
content:
What: Detailed stack analysis for the ucsg-intranet frontend project.
Why: To establish a base understanding of the technologies and frameworks used.
Where: Root directory (package.json, docker-compose.yml), src/app/ (Next.js components and logic).
Learned:
- Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router) with React 19.2.0.
- UI: HeroUI components, Tailwind CSS v4, Lucide React icons, Framer Motion for animations, Swiper for carousels.
- Architecture: Client/Server components model, ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration) for news and events.
- Backend Interaction: Consumes a REST API (defaulting to http://localhost:8080 or process.env.API_URL) for data such as communications and directory.
- Deployment: Docker-ready, integrated with other UCSG services like SIU and Mesa de Ayuda.
- Tools: TypeScript, pnpm, ESLint.
